name: paypal-invoices
title: PayPal Invoices
description: Create and send PayPal invoices without leaving Raycast.
author: ethananderstandable

commands.name: create-invoice
commands.title: Create Invoice
commands.description: Create a PayPal invoice and copy the shareable link.

commands.name: my-invoices
commands.title: My Invoices
commands.description: View and manage invoices created on this machine.

preferences.name: clientId
preferences.title: PayPal Client ID
preferences.description: Your PayPal REST API Client ID

preferences.name: clientSecret
preferences.title: PayPal Client Secret
preferences.description: Your PayPal REST API Client Secret

preferences.name: sandboxMode
preferences.title: Sandbox Mode
preferences.description: Enable this when testing with PayPal sandbox credentials. Disable for real invoices.
preferences.label: Use PayPal Sandbox
